Text.Page:
I’ve seen countless companions fall at the hands of our enemies. We raised a mug in their honor, but what about their families? How will they remember their sacrifice?

We all keep lockers over at Pirate Grotto. If you bring those lockers here, I can hand the personal effects of the fallen back to those who loved them.
(This small locker is filled with worthless trinkets.)
(This small locker is filled with mementos and a shiny, but obviously worthless, rock.)
(This small locker is filled with faded pictures and an empty bottle of rum.)

(This small locker is filled with frilly undergarments and a whip.)

(You close it quickly and move on.)

Thanks for collecting these.

Their families will treasure every item.
